builders.subgoal: Run every acceptance assertion with verifier 'edge_case_testing' (plus IP machine-checkable assertions for completeness) against the integrated artifact in output/integration/, using Node + jsdom + KaTeX. Emit a JSON report with per-assertion pass/fail.

verification_summary: All 22 assertions passed. Report at output/builders/section-5-edge-case-testing/b1-edge/report.json. Edge cases exercised: empty, whitespace-only, valid simple, valid complex (sum w/ frac), malformed (unclosed brace).
